description: Warm palette migration for remaining components — replace all slate-* Tailwind classes with gray-* (warm) equivalents and use semantic design tokens where applicable. These files were not covered by prd_16 (design tokens) or prd_17 (page-level redesign).

userStories.title: Migrate Pricing and Activity pages to warm palette
userStories.description: In frontend/src/pages/Pricing.jsx (22 slate refs) and frontend/src/pages/Activity.jsx (16 slate refs), replace all slate-* classes with gray-* equivalents. slate-50→gray-50, slate-100→gray-100, slate-200→gray-200, slate-300→gray-300, slate-400→gray-400, slate-500→gray-500, slate-600→gray-600, slate-700→gray-700, slate-800→gray-800, slate-900→gray-900. Also replace border classes: border-slate-*→border-gray-*. Use CARD_BASE token where cards use inline border+bg classes. Use BUTTON_PRIMARY/BUTTON_SECONDARY tokens where buttons use inline classes.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero slate-* classes remain in Pricing.jsx
Zero slate-* classes remain in Activity.jsx
CARD_BASE token used where applicable
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Pricing is a public-facing page. Activity is frequently viewed.

userStories.title: Migrate OfferComparison and PrepSection to warm palette
userStories.description: In frontend/src/pages/OfferComparison.jsx (15 slate refs) and frontend/src/components/PrepSection.jsx (14 slate refs), replace all slate-* classes with gray-* equivalents. Use design tokens (CARD_BASE, INPUT_BASE, BADGE_BASE) where components use inline border+bg+text class combinations that match a token.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero slate-* classes remain in OfferComparison.jsx
Zero slate-* classes remain in PrepSection.jsx
Design tokens used where applicable
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: OfferComparison has table styling; PrepSection has form elements.

userStories.title: Migrate FeedbackWidget, FilterBar, and CommandPalette to warm palette
userStories.description: In frontend/src/components/FeedbackWidget.jsx (13 slate refs), frontend/src/components/FilterBar.jsx (12 slate refs), and frontend/src/components/CommandPalette.jsx (12 slate refs), replace all slate-* classes with gray-* equivalents. FeedbackWidget and CommandPalette are modal-like — use MODAL_BACKDROP/MODAL_CARD tokens where they have inline backdrop/card class combinations. FilterBar inputs should use INPUT_BASE where applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero slate-* classes remain in FeedbackWidget.jsx
Zero slate-* classes remain in FilterBar.jsx
Zero slate-* classes remain in CommandPalette.jsx
MODAL_BACKDROP/MODAL_CARD tokens used where applicable
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: CommandPalette is a highly visible component. FeedbackWidget appears on every page.

userStories.title: Migrate HeroSection and ApplicationRow components to warm palette
userStories.description: In frontend/src/components/HeroSection.jsx (11 slate refs), frontend/src/components/ApplicationRow.jsx (8 slate refs), and frontend/src/components/ApplicationRowActions.jsx (10 slate refs), replace all slate-* classes with gray-* equivalents. HeroSection should use bg-surface-secondary for the hero background, font-display for headings. ApplicationRow is the most-rendered component in the dashboard — use BADGE_* tokens for status badges.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero slate-* classes remain in HeroSection.jsx
Zero slate-* classes remain in ApplicationRow.jsx
Zero slate-* classes remain in ApplicationRowActions.jsx
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: ApplicationRow is rendered for every application — high visual impact.

userStories.title: Migrate NotificationBell, KanbanBoard, and KanbanCard to warm palette
userStories.description: In frontend/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx (10 slate refs), frontend/src/components/KanbanBoard.jsx (9 slate refs), frontend/src/components/KanbanCard.jsx (4 slate refs), and frontend/src/components/KanbanColumn.jsx (4 slate refs), replace all slate-* classes with gray-* equivalents. KanbanCard should use CARD_BASE token. NotificationBell dropdown should use CARD_BASE for the panel.

userStories.title: Migrate DetailPanel, StatsBar, and MarkdownEditor to warm palette

userStories.title: Migrate remaining small components to warm palette
userStories.description: In frontend/src/components/ShortcutHelp.jsx (6 slate refs), frontend/src/components/WeeklyGoalSection.jsx (5 slate refs), frontend/src/components/SavedSearchesSidebar.jsx (5 slate refs), frontend/src/components/ResumeSection.jsx (5 slate refs), frontend/src/components/DigestSection.jsx (6 slate refs), frontend/src/components/NotesEditor.jsx (6 slate refs), frontend/src/components/PrepChecklist.jsx (4 slate refs), frontend/src/components/SaveSearchPopover.jsx (3 slate refs), frontend/src/components/OfferDetailsSection.jsx (3 slate refs), frontend/src/components/SharePipeline.jsx (4 slate refs), frontend/src/components/ShareTimeline.jsx (4 slate refs), frontend/src/components/TagInput.jsx (4 slate refs), frontend/src/components/PipelineStagesEditor.jsx (8 slate refs), frontend/src/components/NewEventFormFields.jsx (6 slate refs), frontend/src/components/NewEventForm.jsx (3 slate refs), frontend/src/components/CalendarEventDetail.jsx (9 slate refs), frontend/src/components/ManualAddForm.jsx (4 slate refs), frontend/src/components/JobFilters.jsx (2 slate refs), replace all slate-* classes with gray-* equivalents. This is a batch cleanup — do a find-and-replace of 'slate-' to 'gray-' in each file, then verify build passes.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero slate-* classes remain in all listed files
npm run build succeeds
No visual regressions — gray-* maps to warm palette
userStories.notes: Mechanical find-and-replace — slate-N maps 1:1 to warm gray-N in our tailwind config.
